calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-10-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavena Ward #7017 (Department 218)

Appearances:
David G. Mendez, Esq. appearing on behalf of Plaintiff, Sunrise Hotel, LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: Dharmesh B. Patel, is present.

Defendant, Mark Williams, is not present.

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assign from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Dharmesh B. Patel is sworn and examined under direct examination by David G. Mendez. The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1: 3 Day Notice to Pay Rent or Vacate................................... ID/EV

The Court after hearing the testimony and evidence presented by the plaintiff, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 447 Valencia Street, #225, San Francisco, CA 94110. The rental agreement is canceled. Plaintiff shall recover from defendant past-due rent in the sum of $750.00, hold over damages in the sum of $1,050.00, and costs in the sum of $230.00, for a total money judgment in the sum of $2,030.00.

Counsel stipulates for the return of the Exhibit. Judgment is submitted to the Court and signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID MENDEZ FOR PLAINTIFF SUNRISE HOTEL, LLC
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARK WILLIAMS

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY TRIAL REMAINS
